description: Get ready for the 2022 academic year with our comprehensive email template. Perfect for educational institutions and e-commerce platforms, this template is ideal for announcing back-to-school discounts. Designed to engage parents and students alike, it's filled with exciting offers on all essential school supplies. With this tool, you can effectively communicate exclusive deals and foster customer loyalty. Beyond promoting savings, it also emphasizes the importance of education, helping to build anticipation for the new school year. So, whether you are an online retailer or an educational institution, this email template will make your back-to-school campaign a huge success.
short_description: Get ready for Back to School 2022 with our email template. Ideal for education and e-commerce, it announces discounts on school supplies. Engage parents and students, promote savings and emphasize education. Perfect for a successful back-to-school campaign.

designer.description: I have a degree in graphic design and I am dedicated to the world of communication providing graphic solutions to companies to get the best out of them. I consider myself a detail-oriented, demanding and multidisciplinary person, passionate about the world of communication. I believe in design as a powerful tool to communicate values, ideas and emotions, this is what I try to transfer in any project to always get the best result.
